Product Parameters Product description Type D1S Bulb Type HID Xenon Bulb Input Voltage 12V-24V Bulb Voltage 85V Amperage (A) 1,8A ± 0,2A Output Power 35W Water Resistance Rating (IP) IP68 Colour Temperature 8000K Cool Blue Working Temp -40 ℃ ~ + 105 ℃ Average Service Life ≥3000 Hours Brightness 4300LM D1S XENON BULB 35W 8000K COOL BLUE PRODUCT FEATURES FULL METAL DESIGN The glass tube is fixed with a metal base (metal holder), which not only improves the operating efficiency of the bulb, but also prevents evaporation and atomisation from the lighting at high temperatures. 8000K COOL BLUE D1S Xenon bulb 8000K cool blue, light colour is blue-white, make your vehicle cooler and more personal. LIGHT EFFECT A wider beam provides better visibility and safety when driving at night. WATERPROOF RATING IP68 It is suitable for normal operation in various climates, rain, snow and other adverse conditions. 2 YEAR USAGE PERIOD In case of product quality problems, we offer a replacement within 2 years. PLUG AND PLAY Same size as the original bulb, suitable for 12V-24V vehicles, perfect replacement for the original bulb. ANTI-UV The special anti-UV coating technology protects your headlights from ultraviolet radiation. COLOUR TEMPERATURE Select the colour temperature according to your driving environment. Frequently Asked Questions Q: Does 8000K mean 8000 lumen brightness? A: 8000K refers not to brightness, but to the color of the light emitted by the bulb. 8000K is equivalent to ice blue light. Compared to the traditional 4300K, the light is whiter and bluer, providing drivers with a more comfortable visual effect under normal nighttime conditions. If you frequently drive in rain or fog, 4300K is recommended because the yellow light is more penetrating. Q: How should I choose 4300K/6000K/8000K? A: 4300K is recommended if you drive regularly in rain and fog. 6000K is recommended for normal night driving. Outstanding individuality makes the car more distinctive 8000K is recommended. Q: Will these lamps fit in my vehicle? A: If the original headlight model of your car is D1S, it is suitable for installation. To avoid purchasing errors, it is best to check the original model number of the bulb or read the vehicle manual before purchasing. Q: Is this a high beam or low beam? A: This depends on the headlamp and its design and has nothing to do with the light source. High and low beams are the same. They are only switched by an aperture in the car. Q: How many bulbs are in the package? Can I replace only one bulb in my car? A: 2 xenon bulbs are included. It is recommended to replace both xenon bulbs to avoid unpleasant differences in luminosity and colour temperature.
